summary: We use Australian-sourced Clark-style blanks for all custom orders. The blank choice dramatically affects the final feel — we'll talk you through it before we start shaping.
Rocker is everything. A flat rocker generates speed in small surf; a staged rocker gives control in bigger waves. Most of our shapes sit somewhere in between.

column7: quad and 2+1 setups. The fin box choice is yours — we run FCS II and Futures as standard.

summary: Our signature single-to-double concave system is the result of 50 years of refinement. It creates lift through the fins and drives speed down the line.
Every CI board can be ordered custom. Work with one of our team shapers to dial in the exact dimensions and foil for your surfing.
